description: DemoCorp HR & Finance Data Protection Policy

rules.description: Employee Aadhaar, PAN, bank account, and salary data is classified as Sensitive Personal Data under DPDP Act 2023.
Customer PII including names, addresses, phone numbers, and email addresses from production database must not be copied in bulk.
Financial transaction data, account balances, and payment details are classified CRITICAL under PCI-DSS and DPDP.
